Remove Blank Pages

Detect and remove blank pages Free, open source, and self-hostable so your files stay private.

Open the Remove Blank Pages tool

How it works

  1. Drop your PDF into the tool.
  2. Run the remove blank pages action — no signup required.
  3. Download the result. Files stay on your infrastructure when self-hosted.

Why Stirling-PDF

  • Free and open source.
  • Self-hostable — your files never leave your network.
  • 56+ PDF tools across 5 categories.

Related tools

  • OCR PDF
  • Extract Images
  • Flatten PDF
  • Update Metadata
Stirling-PDF — Free & Open Source
